.file-embed.background: rgb(48, 50, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(52, 55, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(52, 55, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(52, 55, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(96, 113, 164, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(52, 55, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(59, 62, 79) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(48, 50, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(48, 50, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(48, 50, 65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(52, 55, 70) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
